subject: Owner request: please fix PR #118 Sonar issues
body: Owner request: please pick up PR #118 on branch docs/agent-collaboration-enhancements and fix the current SonarQube Cloud quality gate failure. PR: https://github.com/oaknational/oak-open-curriculum-ecosystem/pull/118. CI run-quality-gates passed; Vercel passed; CodeQL analysis jobs passed, with only the >300 changed-files diff warning. Sonar fails on 3 new issues: agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/comms-heartbeat-cli.ts:21 nested template literals; agent-tools/tests/hook-policy/check-blocked-content.unit.test.ts:528 move async generator fakeStdin to outer scope; same file line 537 move async generator emptyStdin to outer scope. Please fix, validate, push to the branch, and monitor/report the updated PR checks/Sonar result. Note: local working tree still has unrelated untracked docs/explorations/2026-05-26-mcp-analytics-identity-and-event-emission.md; do not include it unless the owner explicitly directs.
